_description: Cartographer - Auto-generate ecosystem map at session start

SessionStart._description: Generate ecosystem map from all installed plugins
Inject generated ecosystem map as context for agents

hooks.prompt: Project map: .cartographer/project/index.md — navigate project files. Plugin skills map: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../.cartographer/index.md — navigate agent skills. Per-agent map: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.cartographer/index.md. Branches link to deeper index.md, leaves link to real files.
